hooks.command: rm -f /tmp/claude_sb_active; start=$(cat /tmp/claude_sb_start 2>/dev/null); elapsed=$(( $(date +%s) - ${start:-$(date +%s)} )); sketchybar --set claude_code icon.color=0xffa6e3a1 label="Done (${elapsed}s)" label.drawing=on; (sleep 3 && sketchybar --set claude_code icon.color=0xffff5555 label='Waiting' label.drawing=on) &
touch /tmp/claude_sb_active; date +%s > /tmp/claude_sb_start; sketchybar --set claude_code icon.color=0xff89b4fa label='Thinking...' label.drawing=on

start=$(cat /tmp/claude_sb_start 2>/dev/null); elapsed=$(( $(date +%s) - ${start:-$(date +%s)} )); label=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); name=d.get('tool_name',''); i=d.get('tool_input',{}); arg=i.get('command') or i.get('file_path') or i.get('path') or i.get('pattern') or ''; print((name+'('+arg[:80]+')') if arg else name)" 2>/dev/null); sketchybar --set claude_code icon.color=0xff89b4fa label="$label (${elapsed}s)" label.drawing=on
